Hi, [~cheersyang].
Findbugs warnings are not related to this patch. They seems not expect null input for SettableFuture#set even through it's declared as Nullable, perhaps findbugs can support javax.annotation.Nullable but not org.checkerframework.checker.nullness.qual.Nullable. I think we can exclude these warnings in findbugs-exclude.xml, can you share your thoughts about this?

Hi [~Tao Yang]

Thanks for the patch, you can ignore the findbugs warnings. Those are existing issues even before your patch. Feel free to create another Jira if you want to fix them.

Regarding the patch, I think most of part looks fine to me. Only one doubt here

In ActivityManager, the changes you've done for {{startAppAllocationRecording}}, this seems to have changed the behavior, is it on purpose?

Thanks [~Tao Yang], you are right. I missed a brace at first place so I thought behavior changes. I agree it might have race when multiple node lookup is enabled. Your proposed update should be more safe. Please go for it.

Thanks [~cheersyang] for the confirmation.
Attached v4 patch to fix the race condition risk.
I have manually triggered jenkins job again, hopefully this time we can get a clean result. See [https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-YARN-Build/23941/]

Thanks [~cheersyang] for your concern.
The latest jenkins result seems almost clean, the remaining UT failures are unrelated to this patch.
+1 on the latest patch. Committing shortly. Thanks [~Tao Yang].
I just committed this to trunk, thanks [~Tao Yang] for getting this done.

SUCCESS: Integrated in Jenkins build Hadoop-trunk-Commit #16409 (See [https://builds.apache.org/job/Hadoop-trunk-Commit/16409/])
YARN-9439. Support asynchronized scheduling mode and multi-node lookup (wwei: rev 7fa73fac2676875561269e9408215e012269a18c)

Hi, [~cheersyang].
Findbugs warnings are not related to this patch. They seems not expect null input for SettableFuture#set even through it's declared as Nullable, perhaps findbugs can support javax.annotation.Nullable but not org.checkerframework.checker.nullness.qual.Nullable. I think we can exclude these warnings in findbugs-exclude.xml, can you share your thoughts about this?

Hi [~Tao Yang]

Thanks for the patch, you can ignore the findbugs warnings. Those are existing issues even before your patch. Feel free to create another Jira if you want to fix them.

Regarding the patch, I think most of part looks fine to me. Only one doubt here

In ActivityManager, the changes you've done for {{startAppAllocationRecording}}, this seems to have changed the behavior, is it on purpose?

Thanks [~Tao Yang], you are right. I missed a brace at first place so I thought behavior changes. I agree it might have race when multiple node lookup is enabled. Your proposed update should be more safe. Please go for it.

Thanks [~cheersyang] for the confirmation.
Attached v4 patch to fix the race condition risk.
I have manually triggered jenkins job again, hopefully this time we can get a clean result. See [https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-YARN-Build/23941/]
